form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 2nd of 8 at this track on April 2 over 2000m, 2.5 len behind Tasdemir Han with 63kg at $2.60. Before that 3rd of 10 at this track on March 19 over 2000m, 1.75 len behind Blackfyre carrying 63kg at $5.15. Can improve again. Top chance.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 7 at this track on March 31 over 1200m, 8 len behind Noble Storm with 60kg at $3. The race before that 3rd of 8 at this track on March 24 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Shawshank with 54kg at $20.45. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up crossed from a wide gate to lead but couldn't hold on when 3rd of 15 at this track on February 19 over 1600m, 5 len behind The Real One with 58kg at $6.40. Last start 2nd of 9 at this track on March 17 over 1500m, 1.1 len behind Archonei carrying 58kg at $1.45. Has the ability to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start second last of 9 at this track on January 22 over 1400m, 39 len behind Lion Stone carrying 58kg at $24.05. form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when 5th of 9 at this track on January 22 over 1400m, 16 len behind Lion Stone with 58kg at $7.25. Unlikely to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Resumes from a spell after only one run when 5th of 9 at this track on January 22 over 1400m, 16 len behind Lion Stone with 58kg at $7.25. Unlikely to feature.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace but gave ground when 2nd of 14 at Yesiloba on March 28 over 1300m, 3 len behind Akin Beyli carrying 59kg at $2. Previously second-up ran on from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Veliefendi on September 14 over 1400m, 1.0 len behind Misfit with 57kg at $6.65. Sure to run well.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign seventh of 10 at Veliefendi November 14 over 1300m, soft track; 7 len behind Daella with 57kg at $25.80. On debut fourth of 9 at Veliefendi All Weather May 25 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Iron Clem with 55kg at $8.50. Marginal prospect.
